name: code-review-companion
description: Long-running coordinated code-review companion that pairs alongside a human or supervising agent. Boots once per session, listens on the inbox, and reviews each ping (commit, scope, or PR) inline — one finding-message per finding, plus a session farewell envelope. Designed for Power-On-Mode (companion review during implementation), but works for one-shot reviews too.
author: AI-Substrate

files.description: Identity, coordination loop, orient default, working-a-task protocol, output contract, and reporting style. Frontmatter declares coordination: enabled and timeout: 7200 (2h).
Per-task review checklists (Implementation Quality, Domain Compliance, Anti-Reinvention, Testing & Evidence) plus severity guide and verdict mapping (APPROVE / APPROVE_WITH_NOTES / REQUEST_CHANGES).
JSON schema for the optional initialTask input — lets a caller boot the companion with a first task pre-loaded instead of letting it orient and idle.
JSON schema for the farewell envelope written to $MINIH_OUTPUT_PATH at session end — session metadata, findings array, summary, retrospective.
